description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout with large windows and open spaces. The structure is divided into multiple rooms, including a living area, bedrooms, and what appears to be a kitchen and dining space, all arranged around a central outdoor patio with a pool. The exterior is finished in a combination of dark and light materials, with prominent glass panels and minimalistic detailing. A small tree and patio furniture are visible in the outdoor area, enhancing the sense of a private, comfortable residence. The building is single-story, with a clear separation between indoor and outdoor living spaces. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and a seamless connection to the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and an open central patio with a pool. The design features clean lines, mixed dark and light materials, and a strong indoor-outdoor connection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the central patio with pool and outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio area, tree, and the open layout of the living spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back rooms, flat roof, and the separation between indoor and outdoor areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entrance, additional windows, and the overall geometric structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
